title: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva
display_title: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva
wikitext:
[]: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Feb 01, 2021 4:36 pm I sat on this for a while after watching GoatJesus's video on the most recent trailer. Because I didn't want to be a bother about things. But I feel it's been long enough, and with the movie being delayed again. I see no harm in making a post about it while I still can. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cWIVAJ2vW04 I watched GJs video on the final trailer where he gave his speculation as to why he thought Shinji was not going to be piloting an Eva in the final movie. Because at the end of 3.33. Shinji, after being told not to pilot an eva because 'something bad is going to happen' , by almost everyone. Does exactly what they said not to do and pilots an eva again. Making a bad situation a whole lot worse than it would have been if he had just not done that, and after 3.33 happened. There is no way Misato and Wille would even allow him near an eva ever again, because he's proven himself to be too dangerous in one to be trusted with that kind of power again. Yet in the trailer for the last movie, we see Shinji piloting an Eva again. Which doesn't make much sense to me, because why would they allow him to pilot an eva again after proving he can't be trusted with one? It certainly didn't make sense to GJ either, but his theory in the video helped clarify that to me and was the best explanation for this discrepancy I could find. Quick Summary of GJs theory. possible spoilers for 3.0+1.0 SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Feb 01, 2021 4:50 pm He can't. At least not in a story told via big budgets theatrical movies. Shinji has to get onboard Unit 01 at some point for the ending to happen. He needs to be given a chance onboard Unit 01 and to meet Yui/OG Rei, there is no other way to close the story thematically.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by ShinjiStranglesAsuka » Mon Feb 01, 2021 4:51 pm He can be the cook.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Feb 01, 2021 4:54 pm ShinjiStranglesAsuka wrote: He can be the cook.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Mon Feb 01, 2021 5:01 pm No offense Ray but what you wrote looks almost like fan fiction, it is seen that I quite liked it a lot here instead what I think can happen. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 01, 2021 5:14 pm The "Civilian Shinji" theory was good & solid and a legit possibility back when Q first came out, it has certainly given us some good fanfic, action is NOT the only way to meaningfully contribute to a plot. That said, I think with all those plugsuit shots in the trailers it is as good as jossed. WILLE is canonically understaffed. He could do all sorts of little odd jobs like cooking, sewing, carrying boxes, even playing music for morale. Never underestimate household skills in an apocalypse. It's a pity he cant farm, though he could learn and maybe Kaji explained something to him I mean, there's no way Midori Kitakami is any older than 20. Much of their personnel is quickly trained random survivors already.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Mon Feb 01, 2021 5:25 pm even playing music for morale.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by ShinjiStranglesAsuka » Mon Feb 01, 2021 6:02 pm Shinji will save everyone through the power of friendship don't worry.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Mon Feb 01, 2021 6:15 pm ShinjiStranglesAsuka yes later Misato will offer him a beer

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:02 pm even playing music for morale.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:02 pm Well, he can do a lot of things just like a somewhat normal person. He could help cooking, help Ritsuko get more information about the EVA pilots (this one is a big part, they did it all the time in NGE), help the crew of the Wunder, help the organization in some minor works, clean things off (remember the picture with maid Shinji?), lift heavy things (remember he's 28 years old + angellic super strength ability)... for all we know Wille could even utilize him as a sort of spy to collect information about Neo-Nerv. The list of things Shinji could do is very LONG, Wille surely wouldn't neglect it. This may or not be the right thread for it, but theorizing Shinji wouldn't pilot the EVA in the new movie is clearly not a good idea and indeed didn't last long since in fact Shinji WILL pilot the EVA without ANY doubts.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:04 pm This just reminds me of how im still sad that Madoka never got to have that beer she was gonna with her mom when she grows up. Im sure they could cook up some moonshine solong as they have sugar, but i wonder if beer even exists in the post ti world Ray wrote: So she was six years old when the impact happened. well that's certainly old enough to remember how things were before.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:27 pm FXArmaros98 wrote: even playing music for morale.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:44 pm On a story note There is no way that this movie will not involve Shinji getting into unit 01 again. Of course he has to, he’s the main character and unit 01 is the face of the evangelion franchise in terms of the units. The way they get around people like Misato etc preventing Shinji from piloting is simple. You kill them off or you incapacitate Willie and wunder and Asuka and Mari’s eva units so the only option left is Shinji

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:47 pm EscapismIsBad wrote: Well, he can do a lot of things just like a somewhat normal person. He could help cooking, help Ritsuko get more information about the EVA pilots (this one is a big part, they did it all the time in NGE), help the crew of the Wunder, help the organization in some minor works, ]clean things off (remember the picture with maid Shinji?),

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:49 pm Shinji doesn't own a cello in NTE, his NGE's "hobby" for the cello has been replaced by a hobby for astronomy (which seems to be a real passion of him, since there are posters of stars and astronomy books in his room in 2.0), now if the Wunder has a piano somewhere, he could try to play it.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Feb 01, 2021 7:59 pm ElMariachi wrote: About Shinji escaping the Wunder to get to 01 in the Dark Wunder, I can't see it happening, because unless Shinji somehow learned how to pilot a plane during his stay in 01 during the timeskip, there's no way for him to get to the Dark Wunder on his own, unless Gendo kidnaps him again, but that would be a running gag at this point.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Feb 01, 2021 8:04 pm Ray wrote: Well it is established in the trailer that ReiQ will meet fuyutski again. So maybe she aids Shinji, or Gendo activates some sleeper cell chip in her brain? I can not see Wille allowing her to pilot either, but she has training of all sorts programmed into her. Or. Gendo succeeds in destroying the Wunder and takes all the survivors, which includes Shinji and Misato hostage to show them his final plan? Come to think of it, if the Wunder is destroyed but Unit 01 survives that may explain how Shinji can pilot again without Misato vetoing him because they need Unit 01 to power the Wunder.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Feb 01, 2021 8:16 pm ElMariachi wrote: . Also now that I think about it, there's also the question of how will Shinji be able to pilot 01 since his sync-rate fell to zero for a mysterious reason.

[]: Re: How Can Shinji Help Wille Without Piloting An Eva?             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Mon Feb 01, 2021 8:18 pm This would be more believable If Shinji hadn't gotten off on the worst foot possible. The majority of the Crew would be giving Shinji a wide berth (I can see Sakura and Mari being the exceptions.) Having a former enemy combatant as co-worker would be bad for morale. This is of course, assuming GJs theory in the OP is correct. Also. Reducing him to a glorified maid for Misato and her crew would be a very depressing message to send to fans. Just be a maid to those who are more powerful than you because you don't deserve to be a Shonen hero? I don't like that idea at all.
